title: verbena subincana
intro: Verbena subincana, also known as the Pinkroot or Mountain Verbena, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbena subincana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
